source_files.role: Codex process launch and provider options

split_boundaries.responsibility: CLI command enums and argument model
split_boundaries.guard: parser snapshots and command help parity

split_boundaries.responsibility: Pulse orchestration, artifact execution, and task contract validation
contract, memory, and evidence command surfaces
factory, greenfield, project plan, queue, and completion contracts
split_boundaries.guard: queue/recovery, path validation, and approval-negative tests

split_boundaries.responsibility: release, control-plane, signing, packaging, and verification
split_boundaries.guard: release boundary and credential/provider denial tests

split_boundaries.responsibility: run options, approval binding, adapter process options
split_boundaries.guard: content/base-commit approval binding and explicit model provenance

refactor_order: keep runtime and adapter contracts independent
add model field and approval digest characterization before behavior changes
safety_findings: AO2 CLI source is 69977 lines and combines command parsing, Pulse, factory lifecycle, release, control-plane, and verification.
Inspected AO2 runtime RunOptions does not include a model field.
Inspected Codex adapter launch path does not bind an explicit --model value.
CLI splitting alone must not be treated as approval-byte or provider-provenance hardening.
non_goals: do not alter approval or release behavior in this planning node
do not claim model provenance or live mutation authority
